title: 🚨 Google DeepMind has partnered with Agile Robots to bring Gemini into real world robotics. This is about combining AI models with actual industrial robots to build systems that can reason, adapt, and improve over time. TLDR - Gemini Robotics models integrated with real hardware - Focus on industrial and manufacturing use cases first - Goal is adaptable, reasoning robots not fixed automation - Agile Robots already has 20,000+ deployments globally - Real world data → better models → better robots loop - Combines AI + hardware + deployment scale - Aiming for autonomous intelligent production systems
